title: Cobblemon Apex Worlds
description: All in One Modpack for Enjoying the Best of Cobblemon!!
body:
# **_Cobblemon 1.7.3 is HERE!! Version 1.9.8!_**

_Whether you’re playing solo or with friends, Apex Worlds transforms Cobblemon into the ultimate blend of exploration, collection, and epic battles. Build your dream team, ride into adventure, claim your treasures, and become the Apex Trainer!_

**🖥️ Dedicated Servers**

Want to host an Apex Worlds Server for your friends or community?

**The SERVER file is available on the Apex Worlds Discord in #server-faq**

**💠 Sponsored by BisectHosting -Use Code for 25% off-**


**🛠 Why This Pack?**
I built this modpack out of pure frustration with having to constantly set up new profiles and hunt down mods every time I wanted to play Cobblemon. Now, everything you need is here in one complete, ready-to-play package — just load it up and start your adventure!

🔧 I'm a solo developer maintaining this pack (outside of the incredible mod authors), and I update it regularly — sometimes daily — to bring you the latest features, fixes, and improvements.

All mods remain fully configurable, so you can tweak your experience however you like.

_Check out some of my other work! | Holiday Pokeballs | Better Shiny Mon |_


## _**Just install, Allocate Memory, launch and start your adventure.**_
(Recommended 8000)

✅ Everything listed below is already fully implemented and ready to play — no extra setup required.

**All Pokemon have Models !!!**

🤝 Play together with easy multiplayer hosting for friends or Servers.

🌍 Explore breathtaking custom biomes, dungeons, and hidden treasures.

✨ Catch & collect Legendaries, Mythicals, Ultra Beasts, Paradox Pokémon and enjoy boosted Shiny odds with Alerts!!

😄All Starters have 100% IVs! All Legends have guaranteed 3/31 IVs!!

💥 Battle in style with Mega Evolutions, Dynamax, and pro trainer tools from Mega Showdown.

🗺 Fast-travel anywhere with Waystones and an advanced minimap.

📦 Stay organized with expanded backpacks, refined storage, and Lootr systems.

💎 CobbleLoots – Immersive Poké Ball containers hidden across the world, filled with loot.

🏗 Ati Structures – Epic immersive world structures, Villages and Dungeons scattered throughout the world.

⚙️ MES / MNS / MVS / MSS – Moog’s End Structures, Nether Structures, Voyager and Soaring Structures add massive variety and depth to world generation.

 • Configured structure placements to ensure minimal overlapping for smoother world generation.

🌿 Biome Update – Slightly larger biome sizes and improved Vanilla:BoP ratio.

🎃 Cobblemon Additions – New Halloween and Fairy-themed towns🦇

💥 More Cobblemon move animations.

🖼 Poké Paintings.

🏠 Cobblemon Trainer Structures.

🌳 Botany Pots + Trees + Cobblemon compatibility.

📦 CobbleDollars Shop & Bank – Now stocked with Ores, Logs, Spawn Eggs, Vitamins, Consumables, Evolution Stones, Waystones, Ability Patches, IV Candy, XP Candy, Mega & Dynamax items, and all items required to summon Radical Trainers or Change Pokemon forms!!

🏆 Complete collections of rare Pokémon forms, regionals, and exclusives.

⚡ Quality of life upgrades for smoother gameplay and faster battles

 • Added Search Bar to keybinds (keybinds are bundled, but resets may occasionally remove them)

👊 Radical Trainers – Face powerful Gym Leaders, Rivals, and themed Bosses with competitive teams and rewards in money and items.

👊 Raids scattered across the worlds with vast rewards and guaranteed catches!

🏟 NPC Gyms – Gyms with themed leaders, progression challenges, and rewards

🏘 Cobblemon Additions – Expands world generation with Pokémon-themed villages, Academies, and Immersive NPC encounters.

🧭 Nature’s Compass – Find biomes easily.

🧭 Explorer's Compass - Find Structures easily.

📦 TMs & TRs – Pokémon battles now have a chance to drop TMs and TRs.

🖼 AllTheMons Resource Pack – Adds Pokémon models and is fully compatible with Mega Showdown.

💱 GTS & Hunts – Trade Pokémon and Items globally and take on rotating Pokémon hunts!

🎭 PokéCostumes – costumes for Pokémon from mainline games.

🧸 PokéPlushies – Decorate your base or room with collectible plush dolls of your favorite Pokémon!

**And Much Much More!!**

### **📜 Credits**

A huge thank you to all the amazing mod creators who made Cobblemon: Apex Worlds possible! This pack wouldn’t exist without your hard work, creativity, and dedication to the Minecraft and Cobblemon community.

All included mods are the property of their respective authors.
Full credit goes to them for their original creations.
A complete list of included mods and their authors can be found on this modpack’s CurseForge profile.

(This modpack was built using publicly available mods with permissions provided via CurseForge’s and Modrinth's modpack policies. No ownership of individual mods is claimed.)

🔄 Updated frequently — sometimes even daily — by a solo developer dedicated to keeping the experience fresh and stable.
